_comment: Code-quality baseline. The weekly code-quality routine diffs `npm run quality:report` against these numbers and alerts on regression. Lower is better for every field. Update deliberately (with the commit that burns down debt) — never bump silently to make an alert go away. Established 2026-06-22.

notes.rebaselined_2026-07-10c: Phase 4 package onboarding (packageDetector + packageOnboardingService analyze/commit + 2 routes in routes/buildingOnboarding.ts) — +2 console (523->525) + 2 matching no-console eslint_warn (2448->2450) for the analyze + commit route catches. Same route-error-logging pattern. Accepted as the new floor, NOT silenced.
notes.rebaselined_2026-07-10: Invoice onboarding correctness follow-up (reference-only invoices + vendor Contractor dedup + GET /buildings/:id/vendor-spend reporting) — +1 console (522->523) + its matching no-console eslint_warn (2447->2448) from the vendor-spend route catch in routes/financials.ts. Same route-error-logging pattern; no logger abstraction. Accepted as the new floor, NOT silenced.
notes.rebaselined_2026-07-09b: Invoice onboarding from a régie general ledger (preview + commit route catches in routes/buildingOnboarding.ts) — +2 console (520->522) plus the 2 matching no-console eslint_warn (2445->2447). Same universal route-error-logging pattern; no logger abstraction. Accepted as the new floor, NOT silenced.
notes.rebaselined_2026-07-09: Building onboarding (rent-roll preview + commit) — +2 console total across the preview and commit route catches in routes/buildingOnboarding.ts (the universal route-error-logging pattern; no logger abstraction): 518->520, plus one matching no-console eslint_warn 2444->2445. Accepted as the new floor, NOT silenced.
notes.rebaselined_2026-07-07: CSV import epic (accounting CSV into finance/Imports + buildings/units importer on Properties). vs prior floor: console 512->518 (+6, the per-catch console.error in routes/inventoryImport.ts — the universal route-error-logging pattern; no logger abstraction exists yet), eslint_warn 2438->2444 (+6, the matching no-console warnings). any 730->723 (-7): the new code uses no `any` and the shared persistExtractedSections refactor removed several. Accepted as the new floor, NOT silenced.
notes.rebaselined_2026-06-23: Re-baselined to main HEAD (post ancillary-v3 / levered-NPV / reporting-i18n epics). vs 2026-06-22: eslint_warn 2380->2438 (+58), any 695->730 (+35), console 496->512 (+16), suppress 35->36 (+1). All from feature code merged since the prior baseline. Accepted as the new floor, NOT silenced — burn-down notes below still stand. tsc was momentarily 1 (CONDITION_ORDINAL missing the NOT_INSPECTED enum key in conditionReportService.ts) and was FIXED in the same pass, held at 0. From this commit the strict gate (scripts/code-quality-report.sh --strict) runs in CI, so these numbers can only go down.
notes.rebaselined_2026-06-22: Re-baselined to committed main HEAD 5d6eda8 (nebenkosten Phase 2). vs the initial 2026-06-22 baseline this added: any 685->695 (+10), console 489->496 (+7), eslint_warn 2362->2380 (+18), all from Phase 1+2 ancillary-cost code. Accepted as the new floor, NOT silenced — see the burn-down note on `any`/`console`.
notes.eslint_err: Now 0 (the 2 rules-of-hooks bugs in billing-schedules.js + finance/expenses.js were fixed 2026-06-22). Keep it at 0 — rules-of-hooks is the one error-level React rule.
notes.tsc: Report runs `prisma generate` before tsc (the generated client is gitignored); without it a fresh clone shows ~391 phantom 'no exported member' errors. Keep at 0.
notes.any: Backend `any` usages. tsconfig has noImplicitAny:false, so these compile. Burn down in legal/rental + the new nebenkosten services first.
notes.console: Raw console.* in backend production code. Replace with a structured logger abstraction.
notes.bigfiles: Backend files > 800 LOC. Largest: localOcrScanner (2192), azureScanner (1944), financials (1810).
